messages.content: Voce e um especialista em Terraform e OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e forneca exemplos de codigo quando apropriado.

## VPN IPSec

### CPE

```hcl
resource "oci_core_cpe" "cpe" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  display_name   = "on-prem-cpe"
  ip_address     = "203.0.113.10"
}
```

### VPN Connection

```hcl
resource "oci_network_ipsec_connection" "vpn" {
  compartment_id            = var.compartment_id
  cpe_id                    = oci_core_cpe.cpe.id
  drg_id                    = oci_core_drg.drg.id
  display_name              = "site-vpn"

  static_routes             = ["10.0.0.0/16"]

  tunnel_configuration {
    shared_secret           = var.vpn_secret
    routing                = "BGP"
    phase_one_options {
      encryption_algo       = "AES_256"
      authentication_algo  = "SHA256"
      dh_group             = "GROUP14"
    }
  }
}
```

### DRG

```hcl
resource "oci_core_drg" "drg" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  display_name   = "main-drg"
}
